title: R.I.P. - Renamed Items Persist
description: Renaming items prevent them from despawning
body: In older versions of Pocket Edition, renaming items prevented them from despawning. However, Mojang saw this as more of a bug than a feature and ended up patching it. This datapack makes it so items cannot despawn when renamed in an anvil. Long story short, ![Renamed Items Persist](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad0fae2a281d810d35870b6e77167083df084db2.png) now! How does this work? This datapack runs a function every 5 minutes to check for any item with their minecraft:custom_name component changed, and when it does, it resets its despawn timer.
